question: Which Phase 3 CTLA-4 combination trials in Melanoma should I review, and what were their regimens (return fewer columns)?
natural_question: Which Phase 3 CTLA-4 combination trials in Melanoma should I review, and what were their regimens (return fewer columns)?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' AND "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

question: Show Small Cell Lung studies included in the meta‑analysis that used PD1 agents. (with fewer filtering conditions)?
natural_question: Show Small Cell Lung studies included in the meta‑analysis that used PD1 agents. (with fewer filtering conditions)?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Included in MA", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung';

metadata.parent_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Included in MA", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD1' AND "Included in MA" = 'Yes';

question: Which Pancreatic trials evaluated Ipilimumab in phase 3 (using only one filter condition)?
natural_question: Which Pancreatic trials evaluated Ipilimumab in phase 3 (using only one filter condition)?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab';

metadata.parent_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Pancreatic' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';

question: Show Gastric/GEJ CTLA-4 trials conducted in 2018 or later. (return only two key columns)?
natural_question: Show Gastric/GEJ CTLA-4 trials conducted in 2018 or later. (return only two key columns)?
gt_sql: SELECT "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Class of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ' AND "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' AND "Year" >= 2017;

metadata.parent_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ' AND "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' AND "Year" >= 2017;

question: Show Bladder trials with at least 2 prior lines of therapy that used combination treatment. (with fewer filtering conditions)?
natural_question: Show Bladder trials with at least 2 prior lines of therapy that used combination treatment. (with fewer filtering conditions)?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Breast';

metadata.parent_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Breast' AND "Lines of treatment" >= 2 AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';
